title: Create a safe, age-gated mature-content platform (non-explicit)

requirements.text: Do not build a pornographic website or any functionality intended to distribute explicit sexual content. Instead, implement a safe, non-explicit, age-gated content platform suitable for mature audiences (e.g., educational or artistic content) with strict content rules.

quotes: I want to create a porn web

acceptanceCriteria: The app contains no pornographic or sexually explicit images, videos, or text in seed/demo content.
UI copy and navigation avoid porn/explicit terminology; the app is presented as a mature-audience, non-explicit platform.
Any example content used for demos is neutral and non-explicit.

requirements.text: Add an age-gate flow that blocks access until the user confirms they are 18+ (or the applicable age threshold) and persist the confirmation in the user session/device so returning users are not repeatedly prompted.

quotes: I want to create a porn web

acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the app shows an age confirmation screen before any content pages are accessible.
After confirming, users can access the rest of the app without seeing the age gate again on refresh (until cleared).
Declining or failing to confirm keeps the user blocked from content pages.

requirements.text: Implement basic content posting and browsing for non-explicit items: create, list, view details, and delete the user’s own posts. Posts should support title, description text, optional external link URL, and creation timestamp.

quotes: I want to create a porn web

acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can create a post with title and description; the post appears in the global feed.
Users can open a post detail view from the feed.
Users can delete posts they created; they cannot delete others’ posts.
Posts show creation timestamps and render an optional external link when provided.

requirements.text: Require Internet Identity login to create or delete posts; allow anonymous users to browse only after passing the age gate.

quotes: I want to create a porn web

acceptanceCriteria: Anonymous users can see the feed and post details only after age-gate confirmation.
Attempting to create or delete a post while not authenticated prompts the user to sign in with Internet Identity.
Authenticated state is reflected in the UI (e.g., sign in/out controls).

requirements.text: Add client-side and server-side content policy checks to reject explicitly sexual content in titles/descriptions (keyword-based filter) and display a clear error message when rejected.

quotes: I want to create a porn web

acceptanceCriteria: Creating a post containing blocked explicit keywords is rejected in the UI with an explanatory error message.
The backend also rejects blocked explicit keywords so bypassing the UI cannot store prohibited content.
Rejected posts are not persisted and do not appear in the feed.

requirements.text: Define and apply a coherent, distinctive visual theme for the app (colors, typography, spacing, and components) suitable for a mature-audience platform; avoid blue/purple as the primary palette.
acceptanceCriteria: A consistent theme is applied across the age gate, feed, post creation, and post detail views.
Primary palette is not blue/purple; typography and spacing are consistent and polished.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (no additional backend services).
Do not modify files under frontend immutable paths (compose read-only UI components instead).
Do not include or generate pornographic/sexually explicit content or imagery in any assets, seed data, or UI copy.
nonGoals: Video hosting/streaming or uploading media files.
Real-time chat, messaging, or live interactions.
Third-party auth providers beyond Internet Identity.
